pearce-jason.text: Jason Pearce (Democratic) is a candidate for U.S. Representative, TX-04.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show Jason Pearce had raised $11,783 and spent $10,906 for this campaign.
No public voting record in our set for Jason Pearce (not currently a member of Congress).

fallon-patrick.text: Patrick Fallon (Republican) is the current officeholder running for U.S. Representative, TX-04.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show Patrick Fallon had raised $685,489 and spent $283,212 for this campaign.

On 7-Jan-2025, Patrick Fallon voted Yea on H R 29. A Yea vote required federal detention of unauthorized immigrants charged with theft, burglary, larceny, or assaulting a law enforcement officer, and let state attorneys general sue the federal government over certain immigration enforcement decisions.

base.summary: This is the U.S. House race for TX-04. In the most recent election (2024-11-05), Pat Fallon (REP) won by about 36.77 points out of 353299 votes cast. The bullets below summarize each current candidate's public finance and voting-record data where available.
caveats: This summary only includes facts found in our sourced dataset (FEC finance filings and U.S. House Clerk roll-call votes). It omits anything we could not verify from those sources.
No public data in our set on any candidate's policy positions for this race (the positions field was empty for every candidate as of this build).
No public data in our set on Jason Pearce's policy positions.
No public data in our set on Patrick Fallon's policy positions.
